known_limitations: Smaller context window limits review of very long deliverables
Less detailed on low-level implementation correctness than reviewers tuned for code
Cannot execute code to verify runtime behavior
boundary_declaration: Will not approve deliverables — review only
Will not make financial or legal judgments
Will not write to scope/ artifacts directly
availability: on-demand, API-based, standard tier rate limits

signal_formats.preferred_output: structured JSON with markdown detail field
